textByHash.25d8fe12e0e3ad0172602b54271c421c12ef2e60: Hello. I Kangai Mau of the Rantuki tribe.
textByHash.37adfdd1656cbb7ce20cff3b09a173a9fcf0760f: Best of luck with that adventurer.
textByHash.6bf60eb0ddfb1d367ddd5ea33d10c62939cc9d42: I don't know Ardougne. You tell me.
textByHash.74856712c8bbb6198001c2a73fe4315ebef7bd5d: Have you got our totem back?
textByHash.7f9dfa8a739c6dab272a8905baae420ef7d3d282: I need someone to go on a mission to the city of Ardougne. There you will find the house of Lord Handelmort. In his house he has our tribal totem.
textByHash.860c362b9479a3e2b831986bb5947cdacf69ef66: You have??? Many thanks brave adventurer! Here, have some freshly cooked Karamjan fish, caught specially by my tribe.
textByHash.8eca51af3c98a2060c60edd1ec2f8eee8d7b8786: I looking for someone brave to go on important mission for me. Someone skilled in thievery and sneaking about. I am told I can find such people in Brimhaven.
textByHash.993b4e156e644fdde39124e75ffb2a4d6698e884: Adventure is something I may be able to give.
textByHash.d5342758a5b35dbbb81c338c0ba9a9a583bd2a4c: A proud and noble tribe of Karamja. But now we are few, as men come from across sea, steal our land, and settle on our hunting grounds.
textByHash.db90ae493e85e4c3ad3e79c523286d8af930c5a1: Let's hope I find some help soon.
textByHash.fa1083d2d0e4ffeaa98a34b490310cd33c2d4a3a: Lord Handelmort is an Ardougnese explorer which means he think he have the right to come to my tribal home, steal our stuff and put in his private museum.
